title: Project Brief frontmatter (project.md YAML)
description: YAML frontmatter shape of .atw/config/project.md after Feature 009. Validates origins separation (FR-009), URL syntax (FR-010), and required-field presence (FR-011) before /atw.init writes the file.

atw_backend_origin.description: Origin where the ATW backend container listens. Distinct from host_api_origin (FR-009).

host_api_origin.description: Origin of the Builder's existing API the widget calls for confirmed writes.

host_page_origin.description: Origin of the page where the widget mounts. Used for CORS and ALLOWED_ORIGINS.

login_url.description: Optional. Where the widget redirects unauthenticated shoppers (FR-009 d).

model_snapshot.description: Pinned LLM model snapshot for all LLM-driven phases (FR-005, FR-006). Cost lever per Q5.

then.description: customer-facing-widget deployments require all three origins; checked at /atw.init time.
